name: Max Element Logic
description:
PREVIEW: Maximum element nikalne wali logic wrong result de rahi hai.
FULL: Loop/condition bug ki wajah se last ya highest value correctly track nahi ho rahi.

name: Average Precision
description:
PREVIEW: Average calculation mein precision loss ho raha hai.
FULL: Integer division ya wrong type cast ki wajah se decimal part truncate ho raha hai.

name: Prime Edge Case
description:
PREVIEW: Prime check small inputs par fail kar raha hai.
FULL: 0, 1, 2 ya boundary conditions ke liye proper validation missing hai.

name: Reverse String
description:
PREVIEW: String reverse output expected format se mismatch hai.
FULL: Index boundaries ya mutation approach wrong use ho raha hai reverse routine mein.

name: Array Sum Overflow
description:
PREVIEW: Large array sum incorrect aa raha hai.
FULL: Sum operation fixed-width integer limit cross kar raha hai aur overflow trigger ho raha hai.

languageVersions.Python:
import numpy as np

def total(arr):
    s = np.int32(0)
    for n in arr:
        s = np.int32(s + n)
    return s

print(total([2147483647, 10, 20]))

name: Palindrome Pointer
description:
PREVIEW: Two-pointer palindrome checker kuch cases miss kar raha hai.
FULL: Left/right pointer update ya loop condition incorrect hai, jis se false negatives aa rahe hain.

name: Binary Search Window
description:
PREVIEW: Binary search correct index return nahi kar raha.
FULL: Search window boundaries (left/right) update mein off-by-one bug hai.

name: Factorial Zero
description:
PREVIEW: Factorial function zero input par wrong result deti hai.
FULL: Base case definition incomplete hai aur n=0 correctly handle nahi ho raha.

name: Diagonal Sum
description:
PREVIEW: Matrix diagonal sum expected value se differ kar raha hai.
FULL: Index traversal logic incorrect hai ya center element double-count ho raha hai.

languageVersions.Python:
def diagonal_sum(mat):
    total = 0
    n = len(mat)
    for i in range(n):
        total += mat[i][i]
        total += mat[i][n - i - 1]
    return total

print(diagonal_sum([[1,2,3],[4,5,6],[7,8,9]]))

name: Bubble Sort
description:
PREVIEW: Bubble sort complete sorting nahi kar pa raha.
FULL: Inner loop bounds ya swap condition galat hai, jis se array partially sorted reh jata hai.

name: State Reset
description:
PREVIEW: Multiple test runs mein stale state carry ho rahi hai.
FULL: Shared variable/function state reset nahi ho raha before next execution.

languageVersions.Python:
state = []

def run_case(values):
    for v in values:
        state.append(v * 2)
    return state

print(run_case([1, 2]))
print(run_case([3]))

name: Running Total
description:
PREVIEW: Running total sequence mismatch show kar raha hai.
FULL: Update order ya accumulator initialization incorrect hai.

languageVersions.Python:
def running_total(arr):
    out = []
    total = 0
    for x in arr:
        out.append(total)
        total = x
    return out

print(running_total([2, 4, 6]))

name: String Mutation
description:
PREVIEW: String update operation expected output nahi de rahi.
FULL: Immutable string ko direct mutate karne ki koshish se logic fail ho raha hai.

languageVersions.Python:
def replace_at(s, idx, ch):
    s[idx] = ch
    return s

print(replace_at("debug", 2, "X"))
